facebook.caption: 4.2 stars. 191 reviews. Right on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo in the heart of Phu Quoc. This beach gets rated by real visitors, not travel blogs. Wide shoreline, easy access, no long taxi ride required. Sometimes the best beach is the one you can actually walk to. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Shoes off, sand underfoot, ocean in front of you. Phu Quoc Beach on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo rated 4.2 stars by 191 visitors. Central, walkable, real.

instagram.caption: 191 reviews. 4.2 stars. Right in the center of Phu Quoc. No transfer needed. Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: Walk out the door, hit the sand. Phu Quoc Beach delivers a 4.2-star shoreline with zero effort.
